title: FairyCraftReborn
description: The Mod is about fairies and magic (mainly) others like mythical creatures and witches/wizards. (THE MOD IS HEAVILY BASED OFF OF WINX CLUB)
body:
Welcome to FairyCraftReborn!
to begin your magical journey, craft an enrollment letter and right click it to gain your magical powers.
as the mod progresses forms will be added and unlockable through quests, the mod is still in early development.
